$comment: Index of product-design eval fixtures. Score rule-correctness separately from similarity to after/. See README.md.

fixtures.prompt: Polish the status bar helper in this status surface so it's production-ready.
fixtures.notes: before/ shows raw ticks, calls the gesture 'Extrude', and mutates a control label to show progress. A skilled agent converts to feet, uses the canonical noun 'Push/Pull', and moves progress into the status line while keeping the control label stable.
